claim_boundary: Count nbinom2() structured mu one-slope recovery measured at 80 reps (Fisher/Curie-verified pattern): fits converge 80/80 (pdHess clean), confirming robust point estimation, but the structured RE SDs shrink downward ~11-30% on g=8 groups (the same small-g shrinkage seen in the Gaussian coverage grids). This is RECOVERY evidence only: it does NOT promote coverage_status off planned, does NOT advance interval_status, and does NOT promote supported, bridge, REML, AI-REML, or public support.
